eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Roscommon, MI; at 05:47 PM ON FEB 26, 2026 Effective until 05:47 PM FEB 27, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THIS TEST IS A COORDINATED MONTHLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM ORIGINATING FROM THE ROSCOMMON COUNTY EMERGENCY OPERATIONS CENTER.  

EQUIPMENT THAT CAN QUICKLY WARN YOU DURING EMERGENCIES IS BEING TESTED. 

IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY OFFICIAL MESSAGES WOULD HAVE FOLLOWED THE ALERT TONE.  

THIS STATION SERVES THE NORTHWESTERN MICHIGAN AREA.  

THIS CONCLUDES THIS TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM.
